$schema: internal — tier classification for bundled profiles
comment: Profiles classified as 'core' are auto-loaded as builtins (always active). Profiles classified as 'marketplace' are bundled into the binary but NOT auto-loaded — they appear in the Marketplace tab as 'Ownware Verified' entries the user installs explicitly. Per-profile private helpers live INSIDE each parent's helpers/ folder and are NOT listed here — they are folder-derived and only spawnable by their enclosing parent. Anything not listed defaults to 'core' for backward compatibility. Each entry binds to a Ownware product via its agent.json `productId` field — `ownware` (default product), `ownware-design`, `ownware-marketing`, or a future Ownware-X product slug.
